description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box with a colorful, playful design, featuring a cartoon character of a mischievous child holding a slingshot on the top and sides. The box is labeled 'misbehavin'' in large, red, handwritten-style letters, and advertises '100 shots' and '200 grams' with additional details about height, duration, angle, and volume. The background of the box is illustrated to resemble a wooden fence with sunflowers and grass at the base, giving it a rustic, outdoor feel. Prominent warning labels and product information are printed on the front and sides, along with a circular logo featuring a roaring lion and the text 'King Bird'. The overall appearance is bright and eye-catching, designed to attract attention and convey a sense of fun and excitement.
description: A colorful, rectangular cardboard box with playful cartoon graphics, bold red text, and a rustic wooden fence motif, featuring a mischievous child and prominent branding.
description_view_0: This view shows the top and one side of the box, highlighting the cartoon child with a slingshot, the 'misbehavin'' branding, and detailed product information panels.
description_view_1: This view focuses on the front face, displaying the large 'misbehavin'' text, '100 shots' label, and the King Bird logo at the bottom right, with sunflowers along the base.
description_view_2: This view shows the opposite side from view 0, again featuring the cartoon child, product details, and warning labels, but with a different arrangement of text and graphics.
description_view_3: This view presents the back face, similar to view 1, with the 'misbehavin'' branding and sunflowers, but with less visible product information and a more simplified layout.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular logo with a roaring lion's head, red and yellow colors, and the text 'King Bird', located on the lower right of the front and back faces.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A large cartoon child with a slingshot on the top and sides, and playful 'misbehavin'' text in red, serving as a mascot-style promotional graphic.
